name: Green Cheese
description:
[color=#EEEEEE][b]Normal[/b][/color]

A simple cheese with a vibrant green hue, perfect for casual snacking.

name: Lime Cheese
description:
[color=#EEEEEE][b]Normal[/b][/color]

A staple for cheese lovers, this lime cheese offers a classic sharp and tangy flavor.

name: Purple Cheese
description:
[color=#EEEEEE][b]Normal[/b][/color]

Distinctive in color and taste, this purple cheese is a unique addition to any cheese board.

name: Pink Cheese
description:
[color=#EEEEEE][b]Normal[/b][/color]

Fun and flavorful, this pink cheese adds a pop of color and taste to any meal.

name: Red Cheese
description:
[color=#EEEEEE][b]Normal[/b][/color]

Rich and robust, this red cheese is known for its versatility in cooking and snacking.

name: White Cheese
description:
[color=#EEEEEE][b]Normal[/b][/color]

Classic and creamy, this white cheese is a must-have for any cheese aficionado.

name: Alien Gouda
description:
[color=#00b833][b]Rare[/b][/color]

It's green, it's glowy, it might be from outer space. Ideal for intergalactic picnics.

name: Vampire Cheddar
description:
[color=#00b833][b]Rare[/b][/color]

This blood-red cheddar is best served after dark. Perfect for nocturnal snackers.

name: Neon Blue Brie
description:
[color=#00b833][b]Rare[/b][/color]

A cheese so blue, it could light up your dinner party or at least your cheese platter.

name: Cyber Swiss
description:
[color=#00b833][b]Rare[/b][/color]

This cheese has more holes than your favorite sci-fi plot. A futuristic twist on an old favorite.

name: Phantom Pepper Jack
description:
[color=#00b833][b]Rare[/b][/color]

So spicy, it might just haunt you later. Handle with care and maybe some gloves.

name: Mystic Mozzarella
description:
[color=#00b833][b]Rare[/b][/color]

This cheese is as mystical as it is mozzarella. It’s rumored to grant pizza wishes.

name: Invisible Cheese
description:
[color=#00b833][b]Rare[/b][/color]

You might not see it, but you'll definitely taste it. Great for pranking your friends.

name: Zombie Gruyere
description:
[color=#00b833][b]Rare[/b][/color]

A cheese so good, it could bring the dead back. Just don’t leave it out at full moon.

name: Classic Cheese
description:
[color=#00b833][b]Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

Drops only for first 5 days of the game.

name: Stardust Cheddar
description:
[color=#5259ef][b]Super Rare[/b][/color]

Crafted from cosmic milk, this cheese has a spark that could rival the stars.

name: Lava Gorgonzola
description:
[color=#5259ef][b]Super Rare[/b][/color]

Hot enough to melt your crackers, this cheese is a true volcanic delight.

name: Glacier Bleu
description:
[color=#5259ef][b]Super Rare[/b][/color]

Cold as ice and twice as nice, this cheese is perfect for chilling out.

name: Nightshade Parmesan
description:
[color=#5259ef][b]Super Rare[/b][/color]

Mysterious and flavorful, this cheese is the dark horse of any gourmet spread.

name: Solar Flare Swiss
description:
[color=#5259ef][b]Super Rare[/b][/color]

Bursting with flavor that's out of this world, it's a sunny addition to any cheese board.

name: Phantom Pepper Provolone
description:
[color=#5259ef][b]Super Rare[/b][/color]

This cheese haunts with its spice but pleases with its savory notes.

name: Eclipse Emmental
description:
[color=#5259ef][b]Super Rare[/b][/color]

Rare and refined, this cheese offers a taste of the shadow with every bite.

name: Golden Gruyere
description:
[color=#5259ef][b]Super Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

Not just golden in color, but in taste as well. A treasure on any table.

name: Psychedelic Camembert
description:
[color=#5259ef][b]Super Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

This cheese takes your taste buds on a trip with its vibrant colors and dynamic flavors.

name: Rainbow Ricotta
description:
[color=#5259ef][b]Super Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

As colorful as it is delicious, this cheese is a festive favorite for any occasion.

name: Cosmic Camembert
description:
[color=#FBF653][b]Super Super Rare[/b][/color]

Infused with a touch of interstellar magic, this cheese has a flavor that's out of this world.

name: Magma Munster
description:
[color=#FBF653][b]Super Super Rare[/b][/color]

As hot as the core of the earth, this Munster can light up any cheese plate.

name: Digital Brie
description:
[color=#FBF653][b]Super Super Rare[/b][/color]

This cheese is as modern as it gets, with flavors coded to digital perfection.

name: Royal Reggiano
description:
[color=#FBF653][b]Super Super Rare[/b][/color]

Fit for a king, this Reggiano has a rich history and a richer taste.

name: Gothic Gouda
description:
[color=#FBF653][b]Super Super Rare[/b][/color]

Dark, mysterious, and with a depth of flavor that echoes the gothic era.

name: Shadow Swiss
description:
[color=#FBF653][b]Super Super Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

This cheese has flavors that lurk in the shadows, waiting to surprise your palate.

name: Futuristic Feta
description:
[color=#FBF653][b]Super Super Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

A cheese that's ahead of its time, with flavors that promise a future as bright as its appearance.

name: Spectral Provolone
description:
[color=#FBF653][b]Super Super Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

Almost ghostly in appearance but with a taste that's all too real and tantalizing.

name: Elder Emmental
description:
[color=#FBF653][b]Super Super Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

Aged to perfection, this Emmental carries wisdom and flavor in every hole.

name: Pixelated Parmesan
description:
[color=#FF8D00][b]Ultra Rare[/b][/color]

A cheese that blurs the line between digital and delicious, perfect for retro game nights.

name: Psychedelic Provolone
description:
[color=#FF8D00][b]Ultra Rare[/b][/color]

This trippy cheese is guaranteed to add a splash of color and fun to any gathering.

name: Piggy Parmesan
description:
[color=#FF8D00][b]Ultra Rare[/b][/color]

This cheese is as playful as it is pig-like, adding a whimsical touch to any cheese platter.

name: Cheese Cat Cheddar
description:
[color=#FF8D00][b]Ultra Rare[/b][/color]

Purr-fect for cat lovers, this cheddar is as delightful as it is quirky.

name: Cash Cow Colby
description:
[color=#FF8D00][b]Ultra Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

This cheese is worth its weight in gold, making every bite a rich experience.

name: Oceanic Gouda
description:
[color=#FF8D00][b]Ultra Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

Crafted with sea salt and the essence of the ocean, this cheese brings a wave of freshness to your taste buds.

name: Happy Kitty Havarti
description:
[color=#e356f0][b]Extreme Ultra Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

Always smiling, this cheese brings joy and creamy delight to everyone at the table.

name: Apple Cat Asiago
description:
[color=#e356f0][b]Extreme Ultra Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

Juicy and sweet, this cheese captures the essence of apples with a feline twist.

name: Fresh Feta
description:
[color=#e356f0][b]Extreme Ultra Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

This cheese is as fresh as a brisk morning, with a playful cat-themed appeal that's hard to resist.

name: Unstable Cheese
description:
[color=#e356f0][b]Extreme Ultra Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

Be careful with it!

name: Mystic Mimolette
description:
[color=#e356f0][b]Extreme Ultra Rare[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited[/b][/color]

Embossed with ancient hieroglyphs, this mysterious blue cheese offers flavors that have been cherished through ages.

name: Ukrainian Cheese
description: Glory to Ukraine!

name: Novice Nibbler
description:
[color=#F05656][b]Special[/b][/color]

Awarded for the first 500 clicks. You're just getting started on your cheese clicking journey!

name: Cheese Clicker Champion
description:
[color=#F05656][b]Special[/b][/color]

Celebrate your 5000th click with this exclusive cheese. Keep clicking, keep winning!

name: Master of Muenster
description:
[color=#F05656][b]Special[/b][/color]

10,000 clicks is no small feat! This cheese is a testament to your dedication and click prowess.

name: Stylish Stilton
description:
[color=#F05656][b]Special[/b][/color]

For the fashion-forward clicker. Awarded for collecting 25 different skins. Wear it with pride!

name: Eternal Edam
description:
[color=#F05656][b]Special[/b][/color]

300 hours of gameplay have shaped this cheese into a legend. It's as timeless as your dedication.

name: Iron-Willed Asiago
description:
[color=#F05656][b]Special[/b][/color]

A reward for those who stand the test of time. 300 days away and still counting.

name: Eternally Melting Cheese
description:
[color=#F05656][b]Special[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited (Store only)[/b][/color]

It is forever melting, but it cannot melt completely.͎

name: Party Cheese
description:
[color=#F05656][b]Special[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited (Store only)[/b][/color]

It's always a festive cheese.͎

name: White Noise Cheese
description:
[color=#F05656][b]Special[/b][/color]
[color=#80E1E1][b]Limited (Store only)[/b][/color]

Perhaps one day the picture will appear.͎
